doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The findings contradict the well-established research consensus that learning-styles-matched instruction lacks empirical support, and the implausibly large pooled effect (d=0.62) with unverifiable authors and DOI indicate an invented study.
